title: Add portfolio image deletion functionality for organizers

requirements.text: Add a backend function deletePortfolioImage(filename: Text) in backend/main.mo that removes the specified portfolio image from the organizer's portfolio_images array and returns a success/failure result

quotes: There should be an option to remove already uploaded images too

acceptanceCriteria: Backend function validates that the caller is authenticated and is an organizer
Function verifies the image filename exists in the organizer's portfolio before deletion
Function removes the image metadata from the organizer's portfolio_images array
Function returns appropriate success or error messages

requirements.text: Create a React Query mutation hook useDeletePortfolioImage in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts that calls the backend deletePortfolioImage function and invalidates the portfolio images query cache on success

quotes: There should be an option to remove already uploaded images too

acceptanceCriteria: Mutation hook accepts filename as a parameter
Hook invalidates useGetOrganizerPortfolioImages query on successful deletion
Hook returns loading, error, and success states

requirements.text: Update the PortfolioUpload component in frontend/src/components/organizer/PortfolioUpload.tsx to display existing portfolio images with a delete button (X icon or trash icon) for each image thumbnail, using the useDeletePortfolioImage mutation hook to remove images when clicked

quotes: There should be an option to remove already uploaded images too

acceptanceCriteria: Each existing portfolio image thumbnail displays a delete button overlay or adjacent button
Delete button shows a confirmation dialog before deletion
Clicking delete triggers the useDeletePortfolioImage mutation
UI updates immediately to remove the deleted image from the display
Loading state is shown during deletion operation
Error messages are displayed if deletion fails

requirements.text: When a portfolio image is successfully deleted via the frontend, remove the corresponding image file from the frontend/public/assets/portfolios/ directory to clean up unused static assets

quotes: There should be an option to remove already uploaded images too

acceptanceCriteria: Deleted image files are removed from the static assets directory
File deletion happens after successful backend deletion confirmation
System handles cases where the file may already be missing gracefully

constraints: Only organizers can delete their own portfolio images
Maintain the existing portfolio image storage structure in frontend/public/assets/portfolios/
Preserve the existing PortfolioGallery component functionality for displaying images
nonGoals: Bulk deletion of multiple images at once
